h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

scored.recoheredEarlier: It proves there was some kind of workers' meeting in the margins, even if it does not hand us the names or the whole plan.
scored.statedInsightEvidence: Oh, I get it now: the broadside is power polishing the room before visitors walk in, and the torn notice is the floorboard creaking underneath it.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner was moving toward a tighter, more cautious label sentence that distinguished what the notice suggests from what it proves, following the tutor's prompt to put 'proves' under the lamp.
